canonical_answer: An orange tabby cat with white paws walks along a low concrete wall beside a parked white sedan. A human hand strokes the cat's back and head while it stands on the ledge. The cat jumps down onto a brown wood-patterned tiled floor where a person wearing dark floral clothing and blue sandals continues petting the animal near a brick wall.
